name: Corn 'n Peas Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta until al dente. Drain and rinse with cold water.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta and all remaining salad ingredients; toss lightly.
3. In a small bowl, combine 1/2 cup Salsa, 1/4 cup Oil & vinegar dressing, 1 tablespoon Lime juice, and 1 teaspoon Sugar. Mix well.
4. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss lightly to coat.
5. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
6. To serve, line a serving platter or bowl with lettuce leaves. Spoon the salad onto the lettuce leaves and top with cilantro.
